title: Invalid verified bug with open resolution
summary: Verified bugs must not retain open resolutions.

lineage.rationale: This fixture exists only to prove bug resolution-state validation.

evidence.summary: The invalid fixture still carries an issue-report reference.

audit.notes: Invalid bug fixture for resolution-state invariant.

observed_behavior: A verified bug still claims to be unresolved.
expected_behavior: Verified bugs must carry resolved fix or workaround state.
reproduction_steps: Observe the rejection because the resolution is still open.

resolution.summary: No resolution was recorded even though the bug is marked verified.
